description: Two-pass EBU R128 loudnorm shuttle (analysis pass). Mirrors `ffmpeg -y -i in.mp4 -af loudnorm=I=-16:TP=-1.5:LRA=11:print_format=json:stats_file=mm-loudnorm-0.json -f null /dev/null` for the canonical first pass that writes JSON measurements; the caller would then re-run the same job with loudnorm_pass: 2 against the same loudnorm_statsfile prefix, and the runtime would inject measured_I / measured_TP / measured_LRA / measured_thresh / offset into the loudnorm filter for a deterministic, linearly-scaled second pass.
